result.summary: Sweetspot exposes a password/SSO-authenticated web console only; no public API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was verified.

sweetspot_password.label: Sweetspot console password
sweetspot_password.setup: Create or use your Sweetspot account, then sign in at [Sweetspot console](https://console.sweetspotgov.com) with your email and `password`. If your organization uses SSO, use company login instead; otherwise the standard login form accepts this credential.

sweetspot_sso.label: Sweetspot company login (SSO)
sweetspot_sso.setup: Use your organization’s identity provider via the `Use company login (SSO)` option on the Sweetspot sign-in page. This is the easiest path when your tenant has SSO enabled; your IdP mints the login session for Sweetspot.
